purpose: Reproducible acquisition plan for mining several hundred independently adjudicated historical chess positions.
expected_games_known_minimum_note: Sum of non-null expected_game_count fields only. This is an acquisition sanity check, not a deduplicated game estimate.
ingestion_contract: Fetch each artifact once, record retrieval timestamp and HTTP metadata, calculate SHA-256, and store by content hash.
Parse legal standard-chess mainlines only; strip comments, NAGs, variations, clocks, embedded evaluations, and authored prose.
Deduplicate by initial FEN plus canonical UCI mainline before engine mining.
Never promote a position automatically: deep deterministic engine review, overlap checks, branch-aware grading, and human editorial approval remain mandatory.

packs.expected_game_count_basis: Historical match/event total; verify parsed count at acquisition.
packs.provenance_notes: Direct event file listed by the PGN Mentor event index. The publisher may correct files in place; preserve retrieval time, HTTP metadata, byte length, and SHA-256. Ingest mainline scores only.

packs.expected_game_count_basis: Open archive; OlimpBase reports 2,728 pairings including forfeits and 2,660 played games.
packs.provenance_notes: Event information page identifies the downloadable game archive and reports participation/completeness. OlimpBase is a long-lived legacy site without content-addressed artifacts; snapshot and hash, and retain its explicit missing-game warnings.

packs.expected_game_count_basis: Two six-game matches.
packs.provenance_notes: Legacy direct pack linked as 'Kasparov vs Deep Blue' on a 2003 download page. Cross-check every score against IBM/Kasparov primary sources or a second PGN archive before promotion; mirror only as an internal hashed acquisition.

packs.event: Fischer: My 60 Memorable Games score selection
packs.expected_game_count_basis: Repository README and collection title.
packs.provenance_notes: Pinned Git commit and raw file. Repository intentionally contains scores rather than book annotations. Do not reproduce book prose, diagrams, exercise order, or analysis.

packs.event: Tal: Life and Games score selection
packs.expected_game_count_basis: Repository README and parsed collection scope reported by the maintainer.
packs.provenance_notes: Pinned Git commit and raw file. Use score provenance as a famous-game signal only; write original ChessBench explanations and independently derive answer keys.

packs.expected_game_count_basis: Count during acquisition after legal parsing.
packs.provenance_notes: Pinned commit already used by the historical candidate queue. The immutable raw URL is reproducible, but no broad data-license conclusion is recorded here; strip all authored commentary and independently verify each score.

packs.event: Lichess official broadcasts, November 2024 (includes the start of Ding–Gukesh)
packs.expected_game_count_basis: Use publisher manifest and parsed legal-game count.
packs.provenance_notes: Official monthly broadcast dump. Verify against https://database.lichess.org/broadcast/sha256sums.txt and preserve each PGN GameURL. This is the preferred licensed modern-event source.

packs.event: Lichess official broadcasts, December 2024 (includes the conclusion of Ding–Gukesh)
packs.expected_game_count_basis: Use publisher manifest and parsed legal-game count.
packs.provenance_notes: Official monthly broadcast dump. Verify publisher SHA-256, retain GameURL attribution, and split derived public/private items by source game.
